Register.title: Create account
Register.subtitle: Join the SafeClient community

Resultado.title: Analysis Result
Resultado.noReportsDesc1: This contact has no registered occurrences.
Resultado.noReportsDesc2: If you had a negative experience, use the app to report it.

Relato.title: New Report
Relato.subtitle: Your report will be linked to your account to ensure accountability.
Relato.warningText: This report will be linked to your account. False or defamatory reports may result in civil liability.
Relato.errorNoFlag: Select at least one occurrence type.
Relato.successMessage: Thank you for your contribution. Together we protect each other. ♥

Removal.title: Request removal
Removal.subtitle: This is my contact and I want it removed
Removal.warning: Your request will be reviewed within 12 hours. By submitting, you confirm this contact belongs to you.
Removal.successMessage: Reports for this contact will be removed within 12 hours.
